{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Ezera
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Ezera]] is one of the [[Avernus Travelers]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Ezera]] rarely sees combat.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
